literaquest-t1-s1.title: Vocabulary Clue Trail: A LiteraQuest Mission
literaquest-t1-s1.description: Help restore Whispering Library by completing the Vocabulary Clue Trail challenges.
literaquest-t1-s1.student_learning_goal: I can practice reading comprehension while exploring Whispering Library.
literaquest-t1-s1.instructions: Talk to your guide, then solve each challenge. Mistakes are okay — keep trying!

challenges.prompt: Which choice best fits the Vocabulary Clue Trail clue?
Fill in the blank with the best word.

literaquest-t1-s1.story_context: Something has gone quiet in Whispering Library. Your guide needs your help to bring it back to life. Every challenge you solve restores a little more of the world.
literaquest-t1-s1.mission_summary: Solve the Vocabulary Clue Trail challenges to restore part of Whispering Library.

npc_guides.intro_dialogue: Welcome, explorer! Ready to bring this world back to life?
npc_guides.completion_dialogue: Wonderful work! The world is shining again thanks to you.

learning_cycle.discover: Look around and notice the clues in the world.
learning_cycle.practice: Try the first challenge and learn how it works.
learning_cycle.apply: Use what you learned to solve the next challenge.
learning_cycle.review: Think about what you discovered and how you solved it.

tiers.text: Gentle nudge: read the question one more time.
Closer look: focus on the most important clue.
Almost there: you can narrow it down to two choices.

discoveries.title: Secret of Vocabulary Clue Trail
discoveries.description: An optional bit of world lore to discover. Totally up to you!

literaquest-t1-s1.reflection_prompt: What is one new thing you learned in this mission?

success_feedback.message: You did it! The world feels brighter already.
encouraging_phrases: You kept going — that's what explorers do!
